examples: I like cool weather the most 'cause it's not too hot to wear a jacket but I won't be too cold in my shorts.
Linen has made cool and breathable clothing for millennia.

definitions.text: A moderate or refreshing state of cold; moderate temperature of the air between hot and cold; coolness.
examples: in the cool of the morning

definitions.text: The property of being cool, popular or in fashion.
To lose heat, to get colder.
examples: I like to let my tea cool before drinking it so I don't burn my tongue.

definitions.text: To become less intense, e.g. less amicable or passionate.
examples: Relations cooled between the USA and the USSR after 1980.
